name: ratex-wasm
description: RaTeX browser integration: WASM + Canvas 2D web-render

scripts.build: npm run copy-fonts && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs=require('fs');try{fs.unlinkSync('pkg/.gitignore')}catch(e){};for(const p of ['pkg/ratex_wasm.js','pkg/ratex_wasm_bg.wasm']){if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('prepack: missing '+p+'. Run npm run build before pack/publish.');process.exit(1)}}"
scripts.copy-fonts: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'node_modules/katex/dist/fonts');const dest=path.join(process.cwd(),'fonts');if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.error('Run npm install first (katex is a devDependency)');process.exit(1);}fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dest,f)));console.log('Fonts copied to fonts/');"
